_comment: DAQ configuration for prad2decoder — JLab single-event mode (tag 0xB1)

event_tags._comment: CODA2/JLab legacy control tags (confirmed in PRad-II data). Built-trigger 0xFF50+ auto-detected.

bank_tags._comment: JLab single-event mode banks. CODA trigger bank (0xFF2X) auto-detected by tag range.

ti_format._comment: TI bank (0xE10A): word[1]=trigger#, word[2]=ts_low, word[3]=ts_high. Trigger bits from TI master's 7-word bank: word[5] = 32 FP trigger inputs (bits 16-31 = v1495, bit 16 = LMS).

trigger_bank._comment: 0xC000 bank: 3 UINT32 words per event (event_number, event_tag, reserved)

run_info._comment: 0xE10F bank in TI master crate (tag=0x27): run metadata
